entries.title: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
entries.description: The three-year-old startup raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures.

entries.title: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
entries.description: The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.

entries.title: Upscale AI in talks to raise at $2B valuation, says report
entries.description: AI infrastructure company Upscale AI is reportedly in talks to raise its third funding round since launching just seven months ago.

entries.title: Physical Intelligence, a hot robotics startup, says its new robot brain can figure out tasks it was never taught
entries.description: The new model, called π0.7, represents what the company describes as an early but meaningful step toward the long-sought goal of a general-purpose robot brain.

entries.title: OpenAI takes aim at Anthropic with beefed-up Codex that gives it more power over your desktop
entries.description: OpenAI's agentic coding tool has gotten a major makeover, with a variety of new powers and abilities.

entries.title: OpenAI’s existential questions
entries.description: On the latest episode of Equity, we discuss OpenAI's latest acquisitions and whether they address "two big existential problems" for the company.

entries.title: The 12-month window
entries.description: A lot of AI startups exist partly because the foundation models haven't expanded into their category yet. As many jokingly acknowledge, that won't last forever.

entries.title: Palantir posts mini-manifesto denouncing inclusivity and ‘regressive’ cultures
entries.description: Palantir's ideological bent has come under more scrutiny as it's worked with ICE and positioned itself as a defender of "the West."

entries.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Uber enters its assetmaxxing era
entries.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

entries.title: Tesla brings its robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston
entries.description: The company now offers robotaxi service in three cities, all of them in Texas, after launching in Austin last year and starting to offer rides without safety drivers in January 2026.

entries.title: AI chip startup Cerebras files for IPO
entries.description: In recent months, the company announced an agreement with Amazon Web Services to use Cerebras chips in Amazon data centers, as well as a deal with OpenAI reportedly worth more than $10 billion.

entries.title: Anthropic’s relationship with the Trump administration seems to be thawing
entries.description: Despite recently being designated a supply-chain risk by the Pentagon, Anthropic is still talking to high-level members of the Trump administration.

entries.title: The App Store is booming again, and AI may be why
entries.description: New data from Appfigures shows a swell of new app launches in 2026, suggesting AI tools could be fueling a mobile software boom.
